title: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation
innovation_summary: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation: We introduce digital teleoperation, a paradigm that decouples data collection from physical constraints by replacing the real robot with a generative world model.
